sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56886" key="ke/rkwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κέρκωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growth on the os uteri</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.70</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.106</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n56886.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">appearance of a tail</tr_> to a comet, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).174</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
